paper_claim: The grounded mainline contains 287 admitted source-linked rules, 287 evidence spans, and 26 sources.
OptSemBench-C generates 4,216 probes covering 7,112 renderable feature interactions.
Keyword projection induces 254 contract-collision witnesses among 2,284 declared equivalences.
Operator-only projection induces 238 contract-collision witnesses among 2,268 declared equivalences.
Reference-signature comparison over admitted public evidence produces zero projection-induced collisions.
The projection-surface portfolio contains 17 executable vocabularies, including one-field stress surfaces and strengthened control surfaces.

The public source-surface audit observes keyword labels in all 26 sources, yes/no controls in 12 sources, operator-family labels in all 26 sources, and no source exposes the full reference-signature payload.
The layer+placement semantic basis separates all 498 projection-induced collisions across headline projections.
Repair certificates are sufficient and minimal under finite enumeration and hitting-set checks.

Keyword and operator-only projection-induced collisions remain nonzero after removing any single public source, while an identity audit records retained original witnesses and newly induced witnesses for that information-deletion stress.

The external benchmark-family suite covers 90/90 declared optimizer feature requirements across 12 families; those requirements are represented by 71 distinct deterministic-catalog SQL probes because some probes satisfy multiple declared requirements.

The generated probes execute on DuckDB and PostgreSQL with zero failures for the full corpus and the feature-space representatives, and this evidence is scoped away from collision and field-certificate computation.
Every finite formal obligation asserted in the paper is checked by the replay package.
The probe denominator is a rule-aware coverage benchmark rather than an independent held-out generalization set.
The freeze manifest hashes schema, source inputs, projection/baseline specifications, result-determining code, compute/check scripts, and replay entrypoints.
The anti-overfit audit separates controls and finite-denominator stress from source-sensitive, overlapping-fold, and failed learned-transfer boundaries.
The resource profile reports stage-level and total finite-audit replay cost and labels the 8x row as a deterministic inner-loop lift, not a new corpus, source set, or engine set.
The long-term anonymous archive builder refuses a dirty source tree for release construction and records the source-tree state inside the package.
